canonical_definition: A benchmark for evaluating the capabilities of large language models in understanding and generating responses in Tunisian Arabic, comprising a dataset of 744 instructions and an evaluation framework.
papers: AIArgues Differently: Distinct Argumentative and Linguistic Patterns ofLLMs in Persuasive Contexts
